---
title: Metadata Relative SCSS Path (Same Dir)
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "metadata-relpath-marker", "#cc5501"]
---

## Same-Directory Document

`chapters/_metadata.yml` uses `./styles/chapter-styles.scss`. This doc
in `chapters/` should pick up both vapor and the custom SCSS.
